title: Create: Ice & Creams
description: Get your many ice creams with the power of Rotational Force!
body:
THIS MOD REQUIRES CREATE! (omg)

so basically, this mod adds some ice creams, which use the mod create to make the ice creams

![The creams & ice creams of V1.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e7f3a30b27275c739d1d8e1ad4d453b1b6f52e0.png)
-----------------------------------------------------
**QUESTIONS THAT NO ONE ASKED:**

**Q: When will you add (x) ice cream?**

**A: I try to add as many ice creams as possible with each update. However, I still aim to release an update every time I add new ice creams.**

**Q: Will you port it to (x) version?**

**A: maybe**

-----------------------------------------------------

V0.25 CONTENT:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Coned Vanilla Ice Cream

-Vanilla Cream

-Cone

-[W.I.P] Mechanical Ice Machine

</details>
